summary_text: Top predictors of views_public: traffic_algorithmic_pct (r=+0.48), segment_count (r=+0.39), new_speaker_rate (r=-0.38). LASSO-stable for views_public: thumb_brightness, thumb_colorfulness, thumb_contrast_rms, thumb_sharpness, title_fomo_score, comment_sentiment_mean, share_intent_score, geo_us_pct, geo_latam_pct, traffic_algorithmic_pct, traffic_subscriber_pct, traffic_search_pct, traffic_external_pct, escalation_intensity, payoff_satisfaction_score, peak_spacing_cv, ms_reveal_density_scale_var. Top predictors of retention_30s: geo_asia_pct (r=-0.51), traffic_algorithmic_pct (r=+0.43), geo_us_pct (r=+0.42). LASSO-stable for retention_30s: geo_us_pct, traffic_algorithmic_pct, traffic_subscriber_pct, levity_intensity_ratio. Top predictors of engagement_like_ratio: geo_asia_pct (r=-0.24), geo_us_pct (r=+0.23), traffic_search_pct (r=+0.20). LASSO-stable for engagement_like_ratio: comment_sentiment_mean, comment_avg_length, geo_us_pct, geo_eu_pct, traffic_algorithmic_pct, traffic_external_pct, ending_vs_mean_sentiment, turns_per_minute, ms_topic_coherence_scale_var, ms_word_density_max. Top predictors of engagement_comment_ratio: traffic_search_pct (r=+0.47), traffic_external_pct (r=+0.42), thumb_brightness (r=-0.27). LASSO-stable for engagement_comment_ratio: thumb_brightness, thumb_contrast_rms, comment_sentiment_mean, share_intent_score, comment_avg_length, geo_us_pct, geo_eu_pct, geo_latam_pct, traffic_algorithmic_pct, traffic_search_pct, traffic_external_pct, escalation_sentiment, peaks_per_minute, ms_emotional_intensity_max_argmax_scale, ms_topic_coherence_scale_var. Top predictors of engagement_overall_ratio: traffic_search_pct (r=+0.25), geo_us_pct (r=+0.25), geo_asia_pct (r=-0.25). LASSO-stable for engagement_overall_ratio: thumb_brightness, comment_sentiment_mean, comment_avg_length, geo_us_pct, geo_eu_pct, traffic_algorithmic_pct, traffic_external_pct, ending_vs_mean_sentiment, ms_topic_coherence_scale_var, ms_word_density_max. Top predictors of outlier_potential: pitch_mean (r=+0.30), pitch_std (r=+0.26), traffic_algorithmic_pct (r=-0.23). Top predictors of outlier_spike_score: traffic_algorithmic_pct (r=-0.33), geo_asia_pct (r=+0.31), pitch_mean (r=+0.30). LASSO-stable for outlier_spike_score: geo_asia_pct, traffic_algorithmic_pct. Top predictors of outlier_retention_score: geo_us_pct (r=+0.45), geo_asia_pct (r=-0.42), traffic_algorithmic_pct (r=+0.39). LASSO-stable for outlier_retention_score: thumb_colorfulness, thumb_center_weight, thumb_edge_density, title_fomo_score, parasocial_score, comment_avg_length, geo_us_pct, geo_eu_pct, geo_asia_pct, traffic_algorithmic_pct, traffic_subscriber_pct, traffic_external_pct, cliffhanger_score, peak_spacing_cv, surprise_rate_per_min, shareability_score. Top predictors of ret_baseline: geo_us_pct (r=+0.45), geo_asia_pct (r=-0.43), traffic_algorithmic_pct (r=+0.36). LASSO-stable for ret_baseline: thumb_colorfulness, thumb_center_weight, thumb_face_count, thumb_edge_density, title_fomo_score, parasocial_score, geo_us_pct, geo_eu_pct, geo_asia_pct, traffic_algorithmic_pct, traffic_subscriber_pct, traffic_external_pct, segment_count, cliffhanger_score, peak_spacing_cv. Top predictors of ret_30s: geo_asia_pct (r=-0.33), geo_us_pct (r=+0.31), wpm (r=+0.23). LASSO-stable for ret_30s: thumb_colorfulness, thumb_sharpness, thumb_edge_density, title_personal_you, comment_question_rate, geo_us_pct, geo_asia_pct, traffic_algorithmic_pct, traffic_subscriber_pct, traffic_external_pct, topic_shift_count, escalation_sentiment, intensity_at_3min_ratio, cliffhanger_score, ms_vocab_richness_mean_scale_var. Top predictors of ret_spike_count: geo_asia_pct (r=+0.25), geo_us_pct (r=-0.22), ms_sentiment_range_scale_var (r=-0.19). LASSO-stable for ret_spike_count: geo_us_pct, geo_asia_pct. Top predictors of ret_max_spike: wpm (r=-0.28), geo_asia_pct (r=+0.25), geo_us_pct (r=-0.20). LASSO-stable for ret_max_spike: geo_us_pct, traffic_subscriber_pct, traffic_search_pct.
